specification:
Type: Interactive educational diagram **sim-id:** three-point-cross
**Library:** p5.js
**Status:** Specified An interactive diagram showing a three-point cross with three linked genes. The user can toggle crossover events in region I and region II to see how different crossover combinations produce the eight offspring classes. Color-coded chromatids show parental vs. recombinant segments. A data table updates dynamically to show expected offspring counts and how map distances are calculated from the results.
